violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw chicken were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as fried chicken wings and cream cheese in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Various foods were observed held at 49-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Walk-in cooler was observed at an ambient temperature of 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Time/temperature abused foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Walk-in cooler was observed at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The exterior of kitchen hood has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Area cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Handwashing sign lacking at handsink in kitchen. Handsink in warewashing room blocked and no available hand soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of fanguards in the Walk-In Cooler have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Prep sink observed leaking. 3 bay sink faucet observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Dumpster observed on gravel. Surfaces for outdoor refuse must be smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Unnecessary equipment observed in dishwashing room. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
